understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid. Each level required placing every selectable piece onto a goal simultaneously to win. I progressed through multiple levels, switching control between pieces using CLICK at specific pixel coordinates and moving them to cover all goal positions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used pixel coordinates with 3 pixels per cell. CLICK with a target_position in pixel coordinates switched control to another selectable piece at that position. Objects included walls (#) that blocked movement, blocks (B) that were pushable, selectable pieces (P/S), and goals (+). The movement_blocked heuristic was sometimes unreliable, and interaction was needed to discover true boundary behavior. Pushable objects shifted when the selected piece moved into them. Some moves that seemed blocked succeeded, and careful piece switching was necessary to position all selectables onto goals simultaneously.
